# Form Spec: allFieldTypes
# Generates: F99.00-allFieldTypes.json
# Purpose: Comprehensive test form covering all supported element types and patterns

form:
  id: allFieldTypes
  name: "99.00 - All Field Types (Test)"
  table: all_field_types
  description: "Dummy form to test all supported Joget DX 8.x element types and patterns"

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# SECTION 1: Auto-ID and Basic Text Fields
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
sections:

  - label: "Identification"
    columns: 2
    fields:
      # IdGeneratorField — auto-generated sequential ID
      - id: recordId
        type: id_generator
        label: "Record ID"
        format: "TST-??????"
        envVariable: "testCounter"
        hidden: false
        workflowVariable: "recordId"

      # TextField — plain text, optional
      - id: referenceCode
        type: textfield
        label: "Reference Code"
        placeholder: "e.g. REF-2024-001"
        maxlength: "50"
        required: false

      # TextField — mandatory
      - id: title
        type: textfield
        label: "Title"
        required: true

      # TextField — numeric storage
      - id: sortOrder
        type: textfield
        label: "Sort Order"
        storeNumeric: true
        required: false

      # TextField — readonly display
      - id: systemCode
        type: textfield
        label: "System Code"
        readonly: true
        readonlyLabel: true
        value: "AUTO"

      # PasswordField
      - id: accessPin
        type: password
        label: "Access PIN"
        required: false

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# SECTION 2: Date and Long Text
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  - label: "Dates and Notes"
    columns: 2
    fields:
      # DatePicker — defaults to today, mandatory
      - id: startDate
        type: date
        label: "Start Date"
        dataFormat: "yyyy-MM-dd"
        currentDateAs: "today"
        yearRange: "c-5:c+10"
        required: true

      # DatePicker — optional, no default, range-linked to startDate
      - id: endDate
        type: date
        label: "End Date"
        dataFormat: "yyyy-MM-dd"
        currentDateAs: ""
        startDateFieldId: "startDate"
        required: false

      # TextArea — mandatory with placeholder
      - id: description
        type: textarea
        label: "Description"
        placeholder: "Provide a detailed description..."
        rows: "4"
        required: true

      # TextArea — optional notes
      - id: internalNotes
        type: textarea
        label: "Internal Notes"
        rows: "3"
        required: false

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# SECTION 3: Dropdowns (SelectBox)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  - label: "Dropdowns"
    columns: 2
    fields:
      # SelectBox — bound to MDM lookup form
      - id: districtId
        type: select
        label: "District"
        lookup:
          formDefId: "md03district"
          idColumn: "id"
          labelColumn: "name"
          addEmptyOption: true
        required: true

      # SelectBox — cascading dropdown (filters by districtId)
      - id: agroZoneId
        type: select
        label: "Agro-Ecological Zone"
        lookup:
          formDefId: "md04agroEcologicalZo"
          idColumn: "id"
          labelColumn: "name"
          extraCondition: "district_id=#districtId#"
          addEmptyOption: true
        required: false

      # SelectBox — static hardcoded options
      - id: priority
        type: select
        label: "Priority"
        static_options:
          - value: "high",   label: "High"
          - value: "medium", label: "Medium"
          - value: "low",    label: "Low"
        required: true

      # SelectBox — multi-select, bound to lookup
      - id: hazards
        type: select
        label: "Hazards (multi)"
        multiple: true
        lookup:
          formDefId: "md11hazard"
          idColumn: "id"
          labelColumn: "name"
          addEmptyOption: false
        required: false

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# SECTION 4: Radio and Checkboxes
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  - label: "Radio and Checkboxes"
    columns: 2
    fields:
      # Radio — static options, mandatory
      - id: gender
        type: radio
        label: "Gender"
        static_options:
          - value: "male",    label: "Male"
          - value: "female",  label: "Female"
          - value: "other",   label: "Other / Prefer not to say"
        required: true

      # Radio — dynamic from lookup form
      - id: maritalStatus
        type: radio
        label: "Marital Status"
        lookup:
          formDefId: "md01maritalStatus"
          idColumn: "id"
          labelColumn: "name"
          addEmptyOption: false
        required: true

      # CheckBox — single boolean flag
      - id: isActive
        type: checkbox
        label: "Is Active"
        default_value: "true"
        required: false

      # CheckBox — multi-flag (comma-separated storage)
      - id: conservationPractices
        type: checkbox
        label: "Conservation Practices"
        lookup:
          formDefId: "md10conservationPrac"
          idColumn: "id"
          labelColumn: "name"
        required: false

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# SECTION 5: File Upload and Custom HTML
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  - label: "Attachments"
    columns: 2
    fields:
      # FileUpload — single document, mandatory
      - id: primaryDocument
        type: file
        label: "Primary Document"
        maxSize: "10"
        fileTypes: "pdf,doc,docx"
        attachment: true
        required: true

      # FileUpload — multiple images, optional
      - id: supportingImages
        type: file
        label: "Supporting Images"
        maxSize: "5"
        fileTypes: "jpg,jpeg,png"
        multiple: true
        attachment: true
        required: false

      # CustomHTML — info banner
      - id: sectionDivider
        type: html
        value: "<div class='alert alert-info' style='margin:8px 0'><strong>ℹ️ Note:</strong> All uploaded files are stored securely.</div>"

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# SECTION 6: Computed and Derived Fields
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  - label: "Computed Fields"
    columns: 2
    fields:
      # TextField — area input A
      - id: farmAreaHa
        type: textfield
        label: "Farm Area (ha)"
        storeNumeric: true
        required: true
        validator_type: "double"

      # TextField — area input B
      - id: irrigatedAreaHa
        type: textfield
        label: "Irrigated Area (ha)"
        storeNumeric: true
        required: false
        validator_type: "double"

      # CalculationField — compute non-irrigated
      - id: drylandAreaHa
        type: calculation
        label: "Dryland Area (ha)"
        equation: "total - irrigated"
        variables:
          - variableName: "total"
            fieldId: "farmAreaHa"
            operation: "sum"
          - variableName: "irrigated"
            fieldId: "irrigatedAreaHa"
            operation: "sum"
        numOfDecimal: "2"
        style: "us"

      # LookupFieldElement — display district name from FK
      - id: districtName
        type: lookup_display
        label: "District Name"
        sourceFieldId: "districtId"
        lookupFormId: "md03district"
        lookupColumn: "name"
        displayType: "readonly"
        updateOn: "change"

      # ConcatFieldElement — full location label
      - id: locationLabel
        type: concat
        label: "Location"
        sourceFields:
          - fieldId: "districtId"
          - fieldId: "agroZoneId"
        separator: " / "
        skipEmpty: true
        displayType: "readonly"
        required: false

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# SECTION 7: GIS Polygon Capture
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  - label: "Plot Boundary"
    columns: 1
    fields:
      # GisPolygonCaptureElement
      - id: geometry
        type: gis_polygon
        label: ""
        captureMode: "BOTH"
        defaultLatitude: "-29.6"
        defaultLongitude: "28.2"
        defaultZoom: "14"
        tileProvider: "SATELLITE_ESRI"
        enableAutoCenter: true
        autoCenterDistrictFieldId: "districtId"
        areaFieldId: "area_hectares"
        perimeterFieldId: "perimeter_meters"
        centroidFieldId: "centroid_lat"
        vertexCountFieldId: "vertex_count"
        enableOverlapCheck: true
        overlapFormId: "parcelGeometry"
        required: false

  # Companion hidden fields for GIS
  - label: ""
    columns: 2
    fields:
      - id: area_hectares
        type: hidden
        label: "area_hectares"

      - id: perimeter_meters
        type: hidden
        label: "perimeter_meters"

      - id: centroid_lat
        type: hidden
        label: "centroid_lat"

      - id: vertex_count
        type: hidden
        label: "vertex_count"

      - id: auto_center_lat
        type: hidden
        label: "auto_center_lat"

      - id: auto_center_lon
        type: hidden
        label: "auto_center_lon"

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# SECTION 8: Grid (one-to-many child records)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  - label: "Household Members"
    columns: 1
    fields:
      # FormGrid — embedded child form
      - id: householdGrid
        type: grid
        label: "Household Members"
        formDefId: "householdMemberForm"
        foreignKey: "farmer_id"
        pageSize: "10"
        enableSorting: true
        columns_display:
          - label: "Name",         value: "fullName",    width: "200px"
          - label: "Relationship", value: "relationship", width: "150px"
          - label: "Age",          value: "age",          width: "80px"
          - label: "Gender",       value: "gender",       width: "100px"

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# SECTION 9: Embedded Datalist
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  - label: "Entitlements"
    columns: 1
    fields:
      # EmbeddedDatalist — inline list filtered by current record
      # datalistId must match an ID from project CLAUDE.md "Available DataList IDs" section
      - id: entitlementsList
        type: datalist
        datalistId: "list_imEntitlement"
        height: "300px"
        pageSize: "10"
        showPagination: true
        filterParams:
          - name: "farmerId"
            value: "#recordId#"

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# SECTION 10: System / Hidden Fields
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  - label: ""
    columns: 2
    fields:
      - id: parentId
        type: hidden
        label: "parentId"
        useDefaultWhenEmpty: true

      - id: workflowStatus
        type: hidden
        label: "workflowStatus"
        workflowVariable: "status"

      - id: createdAt
        type: hidden
        label: "createdAt"

      - id: createdBy
        type: hidden
        label: "createdBy"
